name: Whole Wheat Walnut Crumb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour two 8-inch or 9-inch round cake pans.
3. In a small bowl, mix walnuts, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, sift together whole wheat flour, granulated sugar, baking powder, and salt.
5. Add milk and softened butter to the flour mixture. Mix at low speed until moistened.
6. Beat in egg until well combined.
7. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
8. Sprinkle 3/4 cup of the nut and sugar mixture over the batter in each pan.
9. Carefully spread remaining batter on top of the nut and sugar mixture in each pan.
10. Spread remaining nut and sugar mixture on top of the batter in each pan.
11. Bake for 20-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Allow cakes to cool slightly before removing from pans.
13. In a small bowl, whisk powdered sugar with enough water to achieve desired drizzling consistency. Blend until smooth.
14. Drizzle glaze over warm cakes.
15. Serve 6-8 slices per cake.
